A closed tank A is filled with a liquid (specific gravity = 2.25) and has a small air space at its top as shown in figure. A manometer is connected between liquid and water tank (B). If the pressure in the water tank is 100 kN/m2, then the pressure of the air in tank A will be

 
Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

The difference in level of the mercury columns of the differential manometer attached to the venturimeter if the discharge is 0.142 m3/sec is:

 
Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

 
Q3 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A hydraulic jump is formed in a 2 m wide rectangular channel. The post jump depth and velocity are 0.8 m and 0.9 m/s respectively. The prejump depth is _________ m. (Correct upto two decimal places).

NAT
Correct answer: 0.14
Solution

0.14 (0.1 - 0.2)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Correct answer: A

Q6 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

An oil of viscosity 0.01 Ns/m2 is flowing between two stationary parallel plates 2 m wide maintained 10 mm apart. The velocity midway between the plates is 2 m/s. The pressure gradient along the flow is _______________ N/m2/m.

NAT
Correct answer: -1600
Solution

-1600 (-1650 - - 1550)

 
Q7 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following option(s) is/are correct regarding open channel flow.

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
• Atmospheric pressure acts on free surface of OCF.
• Slope is provided to the bed of open channel.
• Flow occurs due to gravity influence.
• HGL (Hydraulic gradient line) is same as the free surface of water.
• OCF are of different types of shape like circular, rectangular, trapezoidal and triangular etc.

Q8 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A circular tank of diameter 3 m contains water upto a height of 8 m. The tank is provided with an orifice of diameter 0.4 m at the bottom. The time taken by water to fall from 8 m to 5 m is ________ seconds. [Correct upto two decimal places]
[Take coefficient of discharge, cd = 0.6]

NAT
Correct answer: 25
Solution

25 (24.50 - 25.50)

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

NAT
Correct answer: -1.71
Solution

-1.71 (-1.67 - -1.75)

Solution
